divisions.title: Solomon Takes the Throne
divisions.summary: Succession intrigue, then Solomon asks God for a discerning heart.

divisions.title: The Temple
divisions.summary: Seven years of building; the glory of the LORD fills the house.

divisions.title: Glory & Drift
divisions.summary: The Queen of Sheba marvels — but a thousand wives turn Solomon’s heart.

divisions.title: The Kingdom Divides
divisions.summary: Rehoboam’s arrogance splits Israel from Judah; golden calves rise in the north.

divisions.title: Elijah
divisions.summary: Drought, ravens, the widow’s flour, and fire from heaven — then a whisper.

divisions.title: Ahab’s Wars & End
divisions.summary: Naboth’s vineyard, Micaiah’s lone truth, and an arrow finds the king.
